text:
Terminology, Fifth Edition (CDT-5). These are 5-position alpha-numeric codes comprising the D series. 
All other level II codes and descriptors are approved and maintained jointly by the alpha-numeric 
editorial panel (consisting of CMS, the Health Insurance Association of America, and the Blue Cross 
and Blue Shield Association). These are 5-position alpha-numeric codes representing primarily items 
and non-physician services that are not represented in the level I codes.
